top_signals.title: IREN enters Europe with acquisition of Spanish AI data center developer Nostrum
top_signals.summary: IREN now has AI infrastructure projects in the works across multiple continents as it expands beyond bitcoin mining.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
top_signals.summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others are holding for the long haul.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Brexit, ten years on
top_signals.summary: The UK’s vote to leave the EU helped spark a populist wave. A decade on, voters are unhappy. Is a reset coming?
